title: Sample Narration Title
description: Short player-facing description. Explain the historical question, the audience, and that green means historical, blue means speculative, purple means alternate.

theme.motif: short visual phrase for the era, e.g. maps, steam, satellites

narrator.name: Guide Name
narrator.intro: One sentence greeting shown while exploring.
wrongLines: Good guess, but history took another path.
Not quite. Test the next clue.

missions.title: Mission Title
missions.description: What the player is trying to trace.

sample-narration-slug::n001.title: Root Event or Big Question
sample-narration-slug::n001.summary:
Line 1: set the scene with real date/place/person.
Line 2: explain why this matters.
Line 3: end with a child-friendly guess prompt.
sample-narration-slug::n001.consequences: Explain the big significance of the root event.

prediction.question: Ask what the player thinks happens next.

choices.feedback: Explain why this is correct using the historical clue.
Explain why this is tempting but not right.

choices.text: A fun but clearly wrong answer for kids.
choices.feedback: Keep the tone playful but educational.

powerUp.title: Skill Name
powerUp.text: One sentence explaining the historical thinking skill learned here.

sample-narration-slug::n002.title: Historical Branch
sample-narration-slug::n002.summary:
Ground this node in factual information.
Use short lines so the Story Card is easy to read.
End with a question if it branches.

sample-narration-slug::n003.title: Speculative Branch
sample-narration-slug::n003.summary:
This is a plausible extrapolation from real evidence.
Clearly explain what is known and what is guessed.

sample-narration-slug::n004.title: Alternate What-If Branch
sample-narration-slug::n004.summary:
Clearly label this as alternate history.
Explain the one changed assumption.
Ask what would ripple outward.

sample-narration-slug::n005.title: Convergence Point
sample-narration-slug::n005.summary:
This node has two parents: n002 and n003.
Use convergence to show different causes leading to the same result.
